name: Hiccups & Hookups
overview: A recently separated single mother, her commitment-phobic and successful younger brother, and her smart but confused teenaged daughter - all of whom make a sweet, unconventional family of three try their best to handle dating, relationships, and life.

trailers.title: Hiccups & Hookups | Official Trailer- Lionsgate Play | Lara Dutta Bhupathi, Prateik B, Shinnova
